texto: Don’t you let nothing stop you from shining the way you supposed to! That be your job, every tick of the clock, just like them stars, until God himself tells you otherwise.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mark Caldwell Jones: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “Don’t you let nothing stop you from shining the way you supposed to! That be your job, every tick…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, inspiracional, inspirational-attitude pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e inspirational-attitude.

frase_original: Don’t you let nothing stop you from shining the way you supposed to! That be your job, every tick of the clock, just like them stars, until God himself tells you otherwise.

texto: Let me see,” Opal said.She quickly slurped up the rest of her lunch and thentook the collar. She examined it very closely. Sure enough,she could see bits of evergreen fur pinched along the buckle strap. As she looked closer, she noticed something else. Several pieces of black onyx were sewn into the back of the collar, and they started glowing.“Well look at that,” Jack said. “Somebody’s put a spider in this biscuit.
explicacao: Citação de Mark Caldwell Jones sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Let me see,” Opal said.She quickly slurped up the rest of her lunch and thentook the collar. She …” articula reflexao, humorous-quotes, collar em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como estudos e reflexao.

Sure enough,she could see bits of evergreen fur pinched along the buckle strap. As she looked closer, she noticed something else. Several pieces of black onyx were sewn into the back of the collar, and they started glowing.“Well look at that,” Jack said. “Somebody’s put a spider in this biscuit.
